title: ライバル登場、その名は……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week does great at the Japanese Derby,
but her battle has only just begun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's in the company of many tough rivals, such
as El Condor Pasa and Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky approaches Special Week with a
mysterious air and challenges her to battle at the
Kikuka Sho and spring Tenno Sho.
